title: Hero content renders on first load
description: Verifies the landing loads and the hero headline and body copy are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify hero headline and supporting description are visible
Verify primary on-page actions are visible (no interaction required beyond load)

title: Setup section reachable by in-page navigation or scroll
description: Verifies visitors can reach the setup documentation without relying on clicking mode toggles; use scrolling or direct URL with hash #setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /#setup or scroll until the Setup section is in view
Verify the Setup section heading and instructional content are visible
Verify Docker-oriented setup copy and code examples are visible (default view)

title: Model configuration section is visible with example snippet
description: Verifies the model-agnostic section shows provider options and a non-empty .env example without requiring tab or button clicks.

steps.description: Scroll to the model configuration section (or navigate to /#model-config)
Verify section heading and provider labels (e.g. OpenAI, Google Gemini) are visible
Verify a code or example block shows FORGE_MODEL / FORGE_BASE_URL style configuration text

title: Setup mode controls are visible (no toggle verification)
description: Verifies Docker and Build from source controls are present for users; do not require clicking them—visibility only.

steps.description: Scroll to the Setup section
Verify labels or controls for Docker and Build from source are visible

title: GitHub repository links use new tab and safe rel (DOM or single click)
description: The only mandatory external interaction is GitHub. Prefer inspecting href, target, and rel on anchors (e.g. data-testid link-github-hero, link-github-nav, link-github-footer). If the runner cannot read the DOM, one click on a GitHub link is allowed; do not require the remote github.com page to load in restricted environments.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Locate a GitHub anchor (hero, navbar, or footer)
Verify href points to the Forge GitHub repository URL
Verify target is _blank and rel includes noopener and noreferrer

title: How it works section visible after scroll or hash
description: Verifies process steps and terminal area are visible without clicking non-GitHub controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /#how-it-works or scroll until the How it works section is in view
Verify section heading and numbered or listed process steps are visible
Verify a terminal-style panel or animation region is visible

title: Linear journey: features through footer without interactive toggles
description: Scroll (or use hashes) from Features through How it works, Setup, Model config, and Footer; confirm each region has visible content.

steps.description: From /, scroll through #features, #how-it-works, #setup, #model-config, then footer
Verify each section exposes readable headings or body content when brought into view

title: Footer branding and external link markup
description: Verifies footer branding and that external anchors use safe attributes; visibility and DOM checks only—no requirement to load third-party sites.

steps.description: Scroll to the footer
Verify Forge branding and copyright year are visible
Verify footer links that open new tabs include target=_blank and rel with noopener (and noreferrer where applicable)
